name: My claim says loss is age-related not work, how to fight?

mainEntity.name: My claim says loss is age-related not work, how to fight?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Counter with audiologist report showing noise-pattern (high-frequency notch) inconsistent with presbycusis.** Independent medical exam (IME) often rebuts.[1][2] Age 50-60 common; prove acceleration. Expert testimony sways commissions.[1] Appeal with new evidence.
